text: Hello. Yes. Hi, good morning. This is Evelyn. So I'm calling because they're appending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through Texas State Relief Program. So far, have you received any updates or notifications about this yet? Yes, I have. I don't qualify. So we actually work with the largest network of Medicare providers and I'd love to help you get your eligibility sorted out. You're on part A and part B, I take it. No. Sorry, but you do not seem to qualify for the plans that we have. Have a great day.
